modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help converting text to a table in Word.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está tratando de convertir texto en una tabla en Word, pero no sabe cómo hacerlo. Se siente un poco perdido y necesita ayuda para entender el proceso. Cualquier orientación sería muy apreciada, ya que quiere organizar su información de manera más clara.
